title: Korbond General Purpose Scissors 5 INCH (13cm) Comfort Grip Professional, Household, Fabric, Crafting, Kitchen. AMBIDEXTROUS – for Right-& Left-Handed Users, 5inch, Yellow
features: GENERAL PURPOSE SCISSORS: Suitable for use when crafting or in the home, Korbond General Purpose Scissors are a household staple
PRECISION BLADES: The General Purpose Scissors feature precision ground blades to ensure accurate cutting every time. Guaranteed to cut right to the tip of the blade
LIGHTWEIGHT: The overall lightweight design makes these shears comfortable to use for extended periods of time, and are suitable for both left and right-handed users
AMBIDEXTROUS: Korbond General Purpose Scissors are suitable for both left and right-handed use
With over 60 years of trading, Korbond is the UK’s no. 1 trusted brand of sewing, crafting & clothes care tools and accessories
description: From the manufacturer Korbond General Purpose Scissors General Purpose Scissors Storage Pocket included Premium Scissors Each Korbond scissor is manufactured with strict precision grinding and polishing methods to ensure a clean and resistance free cutting performance. Every pair of scissors is individually hand checked to maintain consistent optimum quality and to deliver a guaranteed performance. Precision Ground Blades Guaranteed to cut right to the tip Ambidextrous - suitable for left and right handed users Comfort Grip Handle Korbond Scissors The stainless-steel blades ensure Korbond Dressmaking Scissors stay sharper for longer and remain resistant to rust, making them the experienced crafter’s new favourite tool. From snipping threads to neatly cutting fabric to size, Korbond Scissors use precision ground blades making sure the smoothest and most accurate cut is achieved every time. Precision Ground Blades Precision stainless steel ground blades provide a sharp and accurate finish, preventing pulling or draying of fabric when cutting, and guaranteed to cut right to the tip Ambidextrous Ambidextrous handles offer comfortable grip, suitable for both left and right-handed cutting Comfort Handle The handle is moulded to the shape of the hand, making sure the lightweight scissors sit comfortably in your hand when used for long periods of time The stainless-steel blades ensure Korbond General Purpose scissors stay sharper for longer and remain resistant to rust, making them an essential tool in the home. Perfect for opening packaging, trimming flowers and crafting
